positive: Minimalist forest spirits gathering around a glowing crescent moon. The spirits are depicted as flowing, ethereal silhouettes of various woodland creatures (foxes, deer, owls, rabbits), rendered in deep indigo and emerald green ink. They are surrounded by stylized bioluminescent flora and abstract geometric patterns that resemble constellations. Composition is central and balanced, ideal for a t-shirt print. High contrast, clean linework, vector art style, Pacific Northwest woodland aesthetic. Soft rim lighting emanating from the moon and flora. Pantone color direction: Deep midnight blue, forest green, pale gold accents. Flat graphic design, seamless repeat potential.
